articles.title: Last passengers leave virus-hit cruise ship as three more test positive
articles.description: An American and a French national who have returned home have tested positive for hantavirus.

articles.title: Watch: Macron interrupts speaker to tell audience to be quiet
articles.description: The French president stood up during a conference in Kenya to tell the audience to quieten down, saying it was “impossible” for speakers to be heard.

articles.title: Trump says Iran ceasefire is on 'massive life support'
articles.description: The US president criticises an Iranian counteroffer to end the war, and says the month-long ceasefire is "unbelievably weak".

articles.title: Pupils hopeless and crying after 'poorly worded' Higher Maths exam
articles.description: More than 11,000 people have signed a petition calling for a review of the exam saying it was "totally unrecognisable" from what they had prepared for.
